sentences.text: Good afternoon. This is Deidre with rentable. I was looking for and a call at number my call back number is nine five six four seven two four two eight zero again. This is Dino with the rentable looking for Nicole. I had spoke to see of the properties and I was referred to the corner doesn't believe she is the individual that handles the online marketing and advertising of units and reputation management. I was hoping to grab fifteen twenty minutes. Maybe a call back Monday to share some information Dieter with the rentable nine five six four seven two four two eight zero. Thank you.

Thank you for calling C W S Capital Partners. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a dial by name company directory press one to leave a message. Please spell the name of the person first name first press seven for Q and nine for Z to cancel the current operation press Star. Press one for. Press two for. Extension seven five three two to cancel and enter a different name press Star please hold while I transfer your call. Your call is being forwarded to one my tell voicemail system. Is in a meeting? Please leave a message at the tone when finished you may hang up or press pound for additional options.
